description: At the Lighthouse, Benson, Keller, Elena, and May examine the corpse from Reno. Their investigation uncovers evidence of a strange parasite and neurotoxin within the body, drawing parallels to alien fungal infections. The group pieces together the possibility that Sarge is implanting people with alien organisms, ramping up the stakes and giving the team a new, disturbing lead.

transcript.line: Reno PD's first call was to S.H.I.E.L.D.
Takes more than a body to get your attention.
Well, the suspects also fit the description.
What, do you think it might be him?
I know it's him. CCTV confirmed it.
It's Coulson.
He's not Coulson.
We got to call him something.
Not that.
Heard a body came in. We know the cause of death?
No, but if they called us, it means it's not old age.
So... you and Mack, in his office.
Yeah.
You told him. I wish you would have talked to me about it.
If it makes you feel better, he didn't exactly let me finish.
He doesn't want to know so he doesn't have to put us on different missions.
I'm sure that's part of it, but... It's just, I also got the sense that he isn't over you.
Why would you tell me that?
You should know how he feels before... or if we... You should know.
Okay.
But to be clear, I'm in. I will fight for you if I have to. Not fight fight... Mack terrifies me. But more emotionally fight.
Ugh. Always acting so noble.
Yeah, I think you like that act.
This is another first for me.
Whoa.
What happened to him?
They did.
He didn't seem to care if he was seen.
He only cared about turning this guy into some kind of science experiment.
Yeah, we still don't have an I.D., but we should have one soon.
Report says this guy bought a ticket to Sioux City. That's a convergence spot for three separate Ley Lines, FYI.
At this point, I'm not ruling out anything. Benson, Keller, Rodriguez, we need to find out what happened to this man. May, prep a Quinjet.
Already done.
You and I will head that way to see if we can find this guy who's not Coulson.
